Annotation Interface GeneratedValue

@Retention(RUNTIME) @Target({FIELD,ANNOTATION_TYPE}) @Documented @Inherited @API(status=STABLE, since="6.0") public @interface GeneratedValue
Indicates a generated id. Ids can be generated internally. by the database itself or by an external generator. This annotation defaults to the internally generated ids.

An internal id has no corresponding property on a node. It can only be retrieved via the built-in Cypher function id().

To use an external id generator, specify on the

Since:
6.0
Author:
Michael J. Simons

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    GeneratedValue.InternalIdGenerator
    This IdGenerator does nothing.
    static final class 
    GeneratedValue.UUIDGenerator
    This generator is automatically applied when a field of type UUID is annotated with @Id and @GeneratedValue.

    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description

    generatorClass
    Configures the ID generator to use.

    generatorRef
    Configures a bean reference to a bean used as ID generator.
    Class<? extends IdGenerator<?>>

    Configures the ID generator to use.

  • Element Details

    • value

      @AliasFor("generatorClass") Class<? extends IdGenerator<?>> value
      Configures the ID generator to use.
      Returns:
      The generator to use.
      See Also:
      • generatorClass()
      Default:
      org.springframework.data.neo4j.core.schema.GeneratedValue.InternalIdGenerator.class

    • generatorClass

      @AliasFor("value") Class<? extends IdGenerator<?>> generatorClass
      Configures the ID generator to use.
      Returns:
      The generator to use. Defaults to GeneratedValue.InternalIdGenerator, which indicates database generated values.
      Default:
      org.springframework.data.neo4j.core.schema.GeneratedValue.InternalIdGenerator.class

    • generatorRef

      String generatorRef
      Configures a bean reference to a bean used as ID generator.
      Returns:
      An optional reference to a bean to be used as ID generator.
      Default:
      ""
